nasb.text: a land of wheat and barley, of vines and fig trees and pomegranates, a land of olive oil and honey;

esv.text: a land of wheat and barley, of vines and fig trees and pomegranates, a land of olive trees and honey,

cnv.text: 那地有小麥、大麥、葡萄樹、無花果樹、石榴樹；那地有橄欖樹、油和蜜；

ccb.text: 那里盛产大麦、小麦、葡萄、无花果、石榴、橄榄油和蜂蜜；
